static.message: Legacy stream helpers are deprecated in AI SDK v4. Use streamText() with result.toDataStreamResponse() instead.
Provider imports moved to separate packages in v4. Use '@ai-sdk/openai', '@ai-sdk/anthropic', or '@ai-sdk/google'.
Raw fetch to LLM API detected. Use the AI SDK provider functions for consistent error handling, streaming, and type safety.
Hardcoded model ID found. Consider centralizing model configuration so it can be changed in one place.
